Toward Realistic Adversarial Attacks in IDS:
Algorithm 2 Crafting Adversarial Examples for Flow-Base
1: procedure CRAFTADVEX(x)
2:  xadv ← x
3:  t ← 1
4:  m← mean difference()
5:  repeat
6:  for each mask mi ∈ {mask1, . . . , mask15} do
7:  ϵ ← sign[benign mean(f) − x0(f)] · (c · t)
8:  ϵ ← ϵ · mi
9:  xadv ← xadv + ϵ
10:  xadv ← Proj(xadv)
11:  if predict(xadv) == benign then
12:  return xadv
13:  end if
14:  end for
15:  t ← t + 1
16:  until predict(xadv) == benign
17: end procedure
18: procedure PROJ(xadv)
19:  xadv ← ApplySyntacticConstraints(xadv)
20:  xadv ← ApplySemanticConstraints(xadv)
21:  return xadv
22: end procedure
